opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up completely drenched in sweat, shaking violently, and the lump on the side of my neck has grown so fast today I can barely swallow water.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The lump in my neck and throat has swollen up fast today and it's hard to swallow, and tonight I got a sudden high fever with terrible shivering and soaking sweats.

symptom_narrative.onset: the lumps started about 6 weeks ago; the fast throat swelling and the fever, shakes and sweats came on suddenly tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 weeks of lumps overall, but the throat swelling and fever are from the last several hours
symptom_narrative.character: the neck lumps were firm and painless and I could move them, but the one in my neck and throat has swollen up quickly today and now it hurts to swallow and feels like a partial blockage
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I feel really unwell and wiped out; the sweating soaked my bed sheets and I can barely swallow water
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right side of my neck and my throat, and I've also felt lumps in my groin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the lumps have been there for weeks; the fever, shaking and sweats hit suddenly tonight and the throat got worse through the day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting upright helps my swallowing and breathing a bit; nothing else helps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying down and trying to swallow food or big gulps of water makes it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: drenching night sweats, high fevers with violent shivering, feeling exhausted and generally awful
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no episodes like this before; the painless lumps have just slowly appeared over the last month and a half
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed propped up on pillows so I can swallow and breathe more easily

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: painless firm lumps in my neck and groin that have slowly appeared over the last 6 weeks
past_medical_history.how_managed: not looked at by a doctor yet

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've lost about 7 kg over the last month and a half without trying

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about being on my own overnight with this getting worse

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: visible firm swelling on the right side of the neck and throat; patient looks pale and sweaty and is sitting bolt upright
violent shivering (rigors) and bed sheets soaked through with sweat
it hurts to swallow and I can barely get water down; it feels partly blocked
